creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
I don't have .xsession-errors.
But I checked KDE session files (.config/ksmserverrc and .config/session/kwin_saved at previous logout_) and the audacious is not listed in any of them. It seems like KDE Plasma cannot recognize running Audacious QT (but works fine with GTK) then it is not saved in session and not restarted on next boot.
